Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Golds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Akura Golds are being targeted by techniques.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Unknown Akura Golds were lost in the casualties.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Akura Golds are under Lindon's protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Two or three hundred Akura Golds are following the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon wonders if Akura Golds are in the valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — The arrival of the Akura Golds stopped the Fallen Leaf School from pushing the exiles back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — The Akura Golds are seen as over two hundred and fifty new Jades by the Sacred Valley inhabitants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Golds have techniques or constructs to spy on far-off locations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Golds are present during the conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Akura Golds assist the Wei clan by shipping families or individuals to Heaven’s Glory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Akura Golds arrived on clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Akura Golds are a group of people who can rise into the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan's team of Akura Golds abandoned him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Golds prevent unwanted stowaways from boarding Akura ships.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
